reasoningText.text:
The user wants product data normalizer. They give Input: Acqua Di Gio. This seems like a product name a perfume. The output should be JSON only. They didn't give any other metadata. We need to extract product data? Usually product name, brand, category, etc. But we only have the product name. We could produce a JSON with productName or name field. But we might infer brand maybe "Acqua Di Gio" is a fragrance from Giorgio Armani. So we can produce:

{
  "name": "Acqua Di Gio",
  "brand": "Giorgio Armani",
  "category": "Perfume",
  "subcategory": "Cologne"
}

But we don't know details. But we can provide some minimal. Should we add other fields if unspecified?

Given only input, minimal. Output JSON only.

Thus final.
